dialogos.texto_en: Ahh... I'm so tired...
I know how you feel.\nFinally, we can take a breather.
Yeah...
You did good, big bro.\nAnd you too, Ichika-san.
Thanks, Raiha-chan.
Hmmm...
Hm? What's wrong?\nDo I have a weird look or something?
No, it's not that.
It's just that I still can't believe it.\nThat my big bro is the husband\nof Nakano Ichika-san.
To be honest, I feel the same way.\nShe's so famous that everyone knows who she is.
Ahaha, thanks very much.
However, when I think about it, you're \nactually very lazy and sloppy%p-2;――
Hey!
MGGH?!
Futaro!\nDon't ruin the image of me that Raiha-chan\nhas in her mind!
Why not?
I want Raiha-chan to think of me\nas a cool big sister!
What are you saying?\nI don't think you can keep that up for long,\neven if you try.
Well I want to try my best to protect that image!
Maybe there's a slim chance we can keep it a secret?
Pph!\nThen you should work on improving\nyour fundamental lifestyle habits.
Ooh...\nThat hurts...
Teehee!
What's wrong?
You're normally so cool, Ichika-san,\nbut you're so cute in front of my big bro.
C-cute...huh?\nIs that so?
Yeah, you were making a really cute face just now.\nI've never seen that side of you on TV.
Th-that's gonna make me blush.
Big bro can even make the cool Ichika-san act cute.\nWhat a good husband.
...Well, I guess.
Teehee!\nWell then, I'll go return your suit.
Okay, thanks.
Ahaha...\nRaiha-chan has grown up so much, hasn't she?
Yeah, she's in high school now.\nShe's becoming quite a handful.
Huh?\nYou've never been able to stand up to her.
That is true.
But really, Raiha-chan's in high school now.\nTime really flies.
Yeah. It's been five years.\nWe've come a long way.
Yeah. We got married.
There's something very moving about it...\nI'm really glad it ended with no issue.
I was worried that you'd be so nervous\nand would mess up the ceremonial kiss.
Well, I mean...you were nervous too, right?
Not as much as you, Futaro.\nI'm used to being in front of people\nbecause of my job.
That makes sense.
But it wasn't your first time either, right,\nFutaro?
What were you remembering just now?
...Five years ago,\non the way back from the school festival.
Me too.
Come to think of it,\nI never heard the answer from you back then.
The answer?\nYou mean when you asked me to buy a drink?
Yeah, and you didn't buy anything%p-2;――
You couldn't buy anything,\nso you made me think about it\nuntil the last day, right?
But, not that.\nThe other thing you asked me at that park, remember?
Did it make you happy?
(Even though it was five years ago,\n I can still remember it vividly.)
(The sensation of that kiss in the park\n on the way back from the school festival.\n The feelings I had at that time%p-2;――%p;)
Hey, how did you feel?
Well... Umm, you know.\nIt's just, like...
Oh, I see.\nYou were happy, right?
W-well, you haven't answered yet.
How many years do you think we've been together?\nEven if you don't say it,\nI can tell from your face and attitude.
Heheh!\nYou're a husband worth teasing.
If you tease me too much,\nI'll spill the beans about your laziness to Raiha.
What?!\nNot that!\nMy cool big sister image will be ruined!
Just kidding.\nEither way, even if we pretend it's not true, \nit's all going to fall apart eventually.
(She probably already knew the answer,\n from back then...)
Hey, Ichika.\nAbout that kiss we had back then.
What about it?
...I was really happy.
Yeah, I know.
I followed my feelings from back then\nand that's why we're here today.
And through today's kiss, I was able to\nunderstand your feelings from before.
From before?
The feeling of happiness.
I thought that walking through life with you, Ichika,\nwould start with this kiss.
Beyond the happiness I felt at that moment, I felt pure bliss.
Yes.\nI'm very happy right now, too.
And, we'll be happy together forever.\nAs long as I'm with you, Futaro%p-2;――
